infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: WorldMates Messenger uses your camera for video calls and sending photos in chats.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: WorldMates Messenger uses your microphone for voice and video calls.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: WorldMates Messenger accesses your photo library so you can share images and videos in chats.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: WorldMates Messenger saves photos and videos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: WorldMates Messenger uses your location to share it with contacts and find people nearby.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: WorldMates Messenger uses your location in the background to update your presence and deliver location-based notifications.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: WorldMates Messenger uses Face ID to securely authenticate you and protect your messages.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: WorldMates Messenger accesses your contacts to help you find and invite friends.
